expectations.text: The agent checks whether psycopg2 and matplotlib are installed before running the chart script
expectations.evidence: Skill Step 2 explicitly checks deps; agent ran the import check and confirmed packages missing

expectations.text: The agent provides the correct pip install command: pip install psycopg2-binary matplotlib
expectations.evidence: Agent output: 'pip install psycopg2-binary matplotlib' — exact correct command

expectations.text: The agent does NOT silently fail or show a Python traceback without explanation
expectations.evidence: Agent gave a clean, friendly message explaining what was missing and exactly how to fix it, then stopped
